title: astraea gardneri
intro: Astraea gardneri, also known as the "star of the sea" or "astraea", is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of Australia, particularly in Western Australia. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its high antioxidant content, and it is traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation and skin conditions. The health benefits of Astraea gardneri include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. Astraea gardneri is commonly prepared as a topical cream or salve, and can also be consumed as a tea or supplement to support overall well-being.
